$schema_note: Source-of-truth for built-in public-domain hymns. See hymns.README.md (sibling file) for how the app should consume this. Codex: do NOT pre-split lyrics here. Splitting into slides (every 2 lines, per B2) happens at template-build / library-seed time using existing app utilities.

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.lyrics:
Amazing grace! How sweet the sound
That saved a wretch like me!
I once was lost, but now am found,
Was blind, but now I see.

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.lyrics:
'Twas grace that taught my heart to fear,
And grace my fears relieved;
How precious did that grace appear
The hour I first believed!

sections.name: Verse 3
sections.lyrics:
Through many dangers, toils and snares
I have already come;
'Tis grace hath brought me safe thus far,
And grace will lead me home.

sections.name: Verse 4
sections.lyrics:
The Lord has promised good to me,
His word my hope secures;
He will my shield and portion be
As long as life endures.

sections.name: Verse 5
sections.lyrics:
When we've been there ten thousand years,
Bright shining as the sun,
We've no less days to sing God's praise
Than when we'd first begun.

hymns.title: All Creatures of Our God and King
hymns.author: Francis of Assisi (trans. William H. Draper)

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.lyrics:
All creatures of our God and King,
Lift up your voice and with us sing
Alleluia, alleluia!
Thou burning sun with golden beam,
Thou silver moon with softer gleam,
O praise Him, O praise Him,
Alleluia, alleluia, alleluia!

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.lyrics:
Thou rushing wind that art so strong,
Ye clouds that sail in heaven along,
O praise Him, alleluia!
Thou rising morn, in praise rejoice,
Ye lights of evening, find a voice,
O praise Him, O praise Him,
Alleluia, alleluia, alleluia!

sections.name: Verse 3
sections.lyrics:
Thou flowing water, pure and clear,
Make music for thy Lord to hear,
Alleluia, alleluia!
Thou fire so masterful and bright,
That givest man both warmth and light,
O praise Him, O praise Him,
Alleluia, alleluia, alleluia!

sections.name: Verse 4
sections.lyrics:
And all ye men of tender heart,
Forgiving others, take your part,
O sing ye, alleluia!
Ye who long pain and sorrow bear,
Praise God and on Him cast your care,
O praise Him, O praise Him,
Alleluia, alleluia, alleluia!

sections.name: Verse 5
sections.lyrics:
Let all things their Creator bless,
And worship Him in humbleness,
O praise Him, alleluia!
Praise, praise the Father, praise the Son,
And praise the Spirit, Three in One,
O praise Him, O praise Him,
Alleluia, alleluia, alleluia!

hymns.title: How Great Thou Art
hymns.author: Carl Boberg (trans. Stuart K. Hine)
hymns.publicDomainNote: Carl Boberg's original 1885 Swedish text 'O Store Gud' is public domain. The widely-sung English translation by Stuart K. Hine is under copyright in some jurisdictions; if licensing concerns arise, swap this hymn for another PD selection or use only Boberg's verses translated literally.

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.lyrics:
O Lord my God, when I in awesome wonder
Consider all the worlds Thy hands have made,
I see the stars, I hear the rolling thunder,
Thy power throughout the universe displayed.

sections.name: Chorus
Verse 2
sections.lyrics:
When through the woods and forest glades I wander
And hear the birds sing sweetly in the trees;
When I look down from lofty mountain grandeur
And hear the brook and feel the gentle breeze:

sections.name: Verse 3
sections.lyrics:
And when I think that God, His Son not sparing,
Sent Him to die, I scarce can take it in;
That on the cross, my burden gladly bearing,
He bled and died to take away my sin:

sections.name: Verse 4
sections.lyrics:
When Christ shall come with shout of acclamation
And take me home, what joy shall fill my heart!
Then I shall bow in humble adoration,
And there proclaim, my God, how great Thou art!

hymns.title: Great Is Thy Faithfulness
hymns.author: Thomas O. Chisholm
hymns.publicDomainNote: Lyrics published 1923; entered the U.S. public domain on January 1, 2019. Verify per-jurisdiction if shipping outside the U.S.

sections.name: Verse 1
Chorus
Verse 2
sections.lyrics:
Summer and winter and springtime and harvest,
Sun, moon, and stars in their courses above
Join with all nature in manifold witness
To Thy great faithfulness, mercy, and love.

sections.name: Verse 3
sections.lyrics:
Pardon for sin and a peace that endureth,
Thine own dear presence to cheer and to guide;
Strength for today and bright hope for tomorrow,
Blessings all mine, with ten thousand beside!
